footer.tagline: Delivering the finest Indian spices to the world with premium quality and reliable service.

hero.title: Delvonza Exim
hero.subtitle: Delivering the Finest Indian Spices to the World
hero.description: Trusted exporter of premium quality spices from India to global markets

home.welcomeP1: Delvonza Exim is a trusted company specializing in the export and import of high-quality spices from India to global markets. We are committed to delivering premium quality spices that reflect the rich agricultural heritage of India.
home.welcomeP2: Our goal is to connect international buyers with the authentic taste and aroma of Indian spices while maintaining the highest standards of quality, reliability, and customer satisfaction. With a strong sourcing network and efficient logistics support, Delvonza Exim ensures that every product reaches our customers safely and on time.
home.premiumQualityDesc: Carefully selected spices from trusted suppliers across India
home.globalReachDesc: Serving international markets with reliable export services
home.trustedPartnerDesc: Building long-term relationships through quality and service
home.featuredSubtitle: We export a wide range of authentic Indian spices, carefully selected for their quality, aroma, and flavor

0.text: The soul of Indian cooking travels in the spice—authentic, bold, and honest. We export that legacy with the care it deserves.

1.text: Excellence is a habit forged in every harvest, every roast, every seal. Your reputation lands in the same box as ours.

2.text: From India's networks to your port—clear communication, steady logistics, and spices that match the sample every time.

3.text: Trade grows where trust is cultivated. We don't just ship commodities—we build seasons of repeat orders and friendship.

product.contactForPriceHint: Opens the contact page so you can request pricing from our team.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.intro: Thank you for your interest in Delvonza Exim. We are always ready to assist you with inquiries related to spice export, product sourcing, and international trade partnerships.

productsPage.heroSubtitle: We specialize in exporting a wide range of premium quality spices sourced from trusted suppliers in India
productsPage.sectionBody: Our products are carefully selected to maintain freshness, purity, and international quality standards. We supply these spices in different forms such as whole, crushed, or ground, based on the requirements of our global clients.
productsPage.closing: Our focus is to deliver authentic Indian spices with rich aroma, natural flavor, and consistent quality to international markets.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Common questions about our spices, exports, and how to work with us

0.q: Do you export spices outside India?
0.a: Yes. Delvonza Exim supplies premium Indian spices to importers, distributors, and food businesses worldwide. Share your destination port, volumes, and specifications through our contact form or a quote request, and our team will respond with availability and next steps.

1.q: How do I request pricing or a formal quote?
1.a: Use Get Quote on the homepage, the export inquiry section, or the Contact page. Include product names, grades, packaging, approximate volumes, and destination. For products with hidden prices on the site, the product page will direct you to contact us so we can quote based on your market and order size.

2.q: What quality and packaging options do you offer?
2.a: We focus on export-grade lots with clear specifications. Packaging can often be aligned to wholesale, retail, or bulk needs depending on the product. Details vary by item—tell us your preferred bag size, labeling, and any certifications you need when you inquire.

3.q: Can I order a sample before a larger shipment?
3.a: Many buyers start with samples to match aroma, color, and purity to their standards. Mention that you need samples in your message, along with the products and grades you are evaluating, and we will advise what is possible and typical lead times.

4.q: How long does it take to process an inquiry?
4.a: We aim to reply to business inquiries quickly, often within one business day depending on time zone and detail required. For complex quotes or custom grades, a little more time may be needed to confirm stock and documentation.

5.a: Commercial inquiries you send through the website are handled for the purpose of quoting and fulfilling export discussions. Use a secure device and avoid sharing passwords; log out of any shared computer after using your account if you are a registered customer.
